name: Hybrid Cloud Multiple Login Failures From Different Source IPs
notes: This rule triggers when a user fails to login to a cloud platforms 25 times in 2 minutes, from the Different Source IPs.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail, Microsoft Azure Active Directory
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Login Failure
when the event matches Error Code (custom) is any of [Failure or Failed authentication or 50126]
when at least 25 events are seen with the same Destination IP and different Source IP in 2 minutes
thresholds: when at least 25 events are seen with the same Destination IP and different Source IP in 2 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Hybrid Cloud Multiple Login Failures From Different Source IPs on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail, Microsoft Azure Active Directory
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Login Failure
AND when the event matches Error Code (custom) is any of [Failure or Failed authentication or 50126]
AND when at least 25 events are seen with the same Destination IP and different Source IP in 2 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Hybrid Cloud Multiple Login Failures From Different Source IPs
Event description: This rule triggers when a user fails to login to a cloud platforms 25 times in 2 minutes, from the Different Source IPs.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Destination IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
